mdRecord.dcterms:title: Ledger Book of Dr. Thomas Howard 1876-1881
mdRecord.dcterms:description: The ledger book of Dr. Thomas Howard from November 1876-February 1880. In the ledger are the records of each patient's name detailing when they payed their bill, the amount, and how they payed. How payment was received could include "Cash" or "4 Bushels Buckwheat" or other goods, with an equivalent dollar amount.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Doctors
Record keeping
Records (Information)
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
